cameras.blurb: Clean modern film. The everyday look.
cameras.name: DZ Film
cameras.story: The everyday stock. Balanced color, honest grain — the roll you'd keep loaded for whatever the day brings.

cameras.blurb: Harsh flash, warm grain, 27 shots.
cameras.name: Disposable
cameras.story: A plastic one-shot from the gas-station counter. 27 frames, a harsh little flash, and no second chances.

cameras.blurb: Wide white border. Watch it develop.
cameras.name: Instant
cameras.story: Press the button, pull the print, shake it into existence. The party camera that made every fridge a gallery.

cameras.blurb: Scan lines, timecode, tracking noise.
cameras.name: VHS
cameras.story: Top-loading tape-deck energy. Tracking noise, timecode, and the soft hum of a Friday night recording.

cameras.blurb: Sprockets, gate weave, heavy warm grain.
cameras.name: 8mm
cameras.story: Home movies from a sunlit decade. Sprockets, gate weave, and grain you can almost hear clicking through the projector.

cameras.blurb: Early-2000s digicam. Crunchy and bright.
cameras.name: Digicam
cameras.story: An early-2000s pocket digicam. Crunchy sharpening, brave colors, four megapixels of pure confidence.

cameras.blurb: Signs each frame with a handwritten date.
cameras.name: Notebook
cameras.story: The keepsake camera. A clean, warm everyday stock that signs every frame in ink — the date scrawled in the corner like a line from a diary.

cameras.blurb: First-gen smartphone nostalgia.
cameras.name: Pocket Cam
cameras.story: The phone camera that started the feed era. Soft, small, and accidentally nostalgic.

cameras.blurb: Cardboard mount, saturated Velvia color.
cameras.name: Slide
cameras.story: Reversal film in a cardboard mount, saturated like a projector beam in a dark living room.

cameras.blurb: Classic 35mm with sprockets and frame numbers.
cameras.name: Sprocket 35
cameras.story: A classic 35mm compact. Frame numbers on the rebate, an amber date in the corner, light leaks included free of charge.

cameras.blurb: Dreamy halation bloom around the highlights.
cameras.name: Glow
cameras.story: Halation like a memory. Highlights bloom, blacks lift, and everything looks like it happened years ago.

cameras.blurb: Anaglyph 3D. Grab the red/blue glasses.
cameras.name: Anaglyph
cameras.story: A red-and-blue anaglyph oddity. Find the cardboard glasses in a drawer and watch the picture pop.

cameras.blurb: Square instant. Soft, pastel, framed.
cameras.name: Pastel Square
cameras.story: The square instant. Pastel chemistry, a white border, and a caption line waiting at the bottom.

cameras.blurb: Newsreel stock. Narrow sprockets, serious grain.
cameras.name: 16mm
cameras.story: Newsreel stock. Narrow dual sprockets, a touch of gate weave, and grain that means business.

cameras.blurb: Camcorder scan lines and green timecode.
cameras.name: Camcorder
cameras.story: A shoulder-strap camcorder with a flip-out screen. Scan lines, green timecode, birthday-party autofocus.

cameras.blurb: Anamorphic bars. Warm, quiet contrast.
cameras.name: Kino
cameras.story: Wide-screen romance. Anamorphic bars, warm halation, and contrast that whispers instead of shouts.

cameras.blurb: Medium format. Creamy, calm, unhurried.
cameras.name: Heirloom
cameras.story: Medium-format manners. A big, calm negative — creamy tones, gentle drama, absolutely no hurry.

cameras.blurb: Street B&W. Deep blacks, no mercy.
cameras.name: Noir
cameras.story: A black pocket brick beloved by street shooters. Contrasty black-and-white, deep shadows, zone-focus speed.

cameras.blurb: The drugstore standard. Golden and soft.
cameras.name: Original
cameras.story: The drugstore standard. Golden warmth and soft contrast — the look every shoebox of prints shares.

cameras.blurb: Yearbook flash. Bright, green, unflinching.
cameras.name: Yearbook
cameras.story: Yearbook night. Direct flash, slightly green fluorescents, and everyone's eyes a little red.

cameras.blurb: Eastern-bloc box. Wild leaks, zero apologies.
cameras.name: Light Leak
cameras.story: A brassy Eastern-bloc box with a mind of its own. Heavy vignette, wild leaks, zero apologies.

cameras.blurb: Sun-bleached '70s. Yellowed and faded.
cameras.name: Sunbleached
cameras.story: Sun-bleached like a photo left on a dashboard since 1976. Yellowed highlights, faded blacks, warm dust.

cameras.blurb: A lens the size of a lentil.
cameras.name: Keychain
cameras.story: A flip-phone lens the size of a lentil. Low saturation, mushy detail, undeniable charm.

cameras.blurb: Plastic toy cam. Tunnel vignette, loud color.
cameras.name: Toy Cam
cameras.story: A plastic toy camera that takes itself completely seriously. Oversaturated, tunnel vignette, focus optional.

cameras.blurb: Night-edition cine. Cool and blue-shadowed.
cameras.name: Midnight
cameras.story: Night-edition cine stock. Cool neutrals, gentle contrast, shadows that stay a little blue.
